chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-96 of 2020. 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 08-06-2020. Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Shar, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, AAG. >>>>>...<<<<< The perusal of the petition reveals that there is dispute between the parties over the landed property, such dispute being factual in its character could not be resolved by this court summarily in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction under by the garb of harassment. Consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A
